cwr-au-directions.en:
Suggested twice a day or as recommended by your healthcare professional.

Ensure Powder can be enjoyed as a delicious health shake with or between meals, or to replace a meal.

To prepare a 230 mL serving of Ensure Powder:
1) Pour 195 mL of cold water into a glass.
2) Gradually add 6 level scoops or 53.8 g of Ensure Powder while stirring and mix until dissolved. Ensure is best served chilled.

Ensure Powder can also be added to a wide range of recipes as a nutritional boost to your favourite meal.

Opened can should be covered and stored in a cool, dry place, but NOT refrigerated. Once opened, use contents within 3 weeks.

Prepared Ensure should be used promptly or covered, refrigerated and used within 24 hours.

cwr-au-ingredients.en:
Hydrolysed corn starch, maltodextrin, sucrose, milk protein concentrate, high oleic sunflower oil, soy protein isolate, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), soy oil, MINERALS (sodium citrate, potassium chloride, potassium citrate, magnesium chloride, calcium carbonate, potassium phosphate, tricalcium phosphate, ferrous sulphate, zinc sulphate, manganese sulphate, cupric sulphate, chromium chloride, potassium iodide, sodium molybdate, sodium selenate), canola oil, flavouring, VITAMINS (choline chloride, ascorbic acid, calcium pantothenate, Vitamin E, niacinamide, pyridoxine hydrochloride, riboflavin, Vitamin A palmitate, thiamin hydrochloride, beta carotene, folic acid, phylloquinone, biotin, Vitamin D3, cyanocobalamin), ANTIOXIDANTS (304, 307b).


Contains: Milk and Soy Ingredients.

cwr-au-mandatory-statement.en:
Always read the label and follow the directions for use. 

Please refer to any health and product warnings below.

cwr-au-warnings.en:
Food for Special Medical Purposes. Use under medical supervision.

Ensure Powder is suitable as a sole source of nutrition or as a supplement.

Not intended for use in children unless recommended by a physician or other qualified healthcare professional.

Not for use in galactosaemia.

Not for parenteral use.

Ensure Powder has increased levels of zinc compared to standard feeds.

description.en:
Ensure Powder is a complete, balanced oral nutritional supplement, scientifically formulated for people with or at risk of malnutrition, to help support strength, energy and immunity.

Ensure Powder Features and Benefits:
1) Complete and balanced nutrition with 28 essential vitamins and minerals to help fill nutritional gaps.
2) High quality triple protein complex (whey, casein and soy) and vitamin D to keep muscles strong.
4) Calcium, phosphorus and vitamin D to maintain bone health.
5) Prebiotic fibre and antioxidants (vitamins C, E, zinc and selenium) for immune support.
6) Low lactose* and gluten free**

After your purchase visit www.abbottrewards.com.au where you can earn up to $40 cashback† just by purchasing a tin of Ensure, Glucerna or PediaSure. It's our way of saying thank you for choosing Abbott.

*Low lactose refers to the product containing no more than 2 g of lactose per 100 g.
**Gluten free refers to the product containing no detectable gluten at a limit of quantification of 5 ppm.

†T&C's apply. Valid for purchases made between 12:01am on 01/07/2025 and 11:59pm AEDT on 31/07/2026. Proof of purchase required. Visit www.abbottrewards.com.au for full details.

Ensure is the #1 Nutritional supplement drink in the world^ and is backed by over 45 clinical studies.

^ Source Euromonitor International Limited; Consumer Health 2025 edition, per Supplement Nutrition Drinks category definition, retail value sales, RSP 2024 data.

Suitable For: Ensure is suitable as a sole source of nutrition or as a supplement as it has been carefully formulated to include all the key ingredients for a nutritionally complete and balanced health shake.

Providing high-quality protein, Ensure tastes great and is perfect addition to your day.

Ensure may assist:
- During illness or recovery from illness
- When preparing for surgery, or post surgery
- If you have a poor appetite or involuntary weight loss
- If you have increased nutritional requirements
- To maintain good nutrition

Size: 850g

KEY FEATURES

• 28 essential vitamins and minerals to help keep you strong and healthy
• High quality protein to support muscle development
• Enriched with prebiotic fibre (FOS) to support gut and immune health

cwr-au-directions.en: 1 Remove the wrapper, peel off paper strip 2 Follow the arrows on the strip to place product in underwear 3 Press guard into underwear, adhesive side down and pull up underwear

cwr-supplier-content.en:
You are not alone and you can get back to doing the things you love with Depend Guards.

5.1 million Australians experience bladder leakage*

If experiencing bladder leaks is new to you, know that you are not alone, and in fact it's quite common for many men.

Source*Millward Brown (2018) U&A, ABS population.** ABS (2015), Caregiver research USA (2018).

Take care of your bladder health

Changes in health and lifestyle habits can help reduce the likelihood of incontinence

  • • drink at least 6 to 8 glasses of water a day
  • • do your pelvic floor muscle exercises
  • • maintain an ideal body weight
  • • eat plenty of high-fibre foods
  • • avoid being constipated
  • • don't go to the toilet 'just in case' - only go when you need to

Depend Guards fit inside your own underwear, so you can get back to being active and doing the things you love.

description.en:
Designed with the male anatomy in mind, Depend Men Level 2 Guards deliver targeted 5-in-1 leak and odour protection for discreet coverage against moderate bladder leakage.

Specially designed to help you maintain a normal lifestyle, Depend Men Guards are fast-absorbing to lock in leaks and give you worry-free odour control with a close, comfortable fit that feels secure in your underwear.

Size: 20 Pack

KEY FEATURES

• 5-in-1 Leak & Odour Protection for Moderate Leakage
• Fast Absorption: Locks in moisture to keep you feeling dry
• Shaped for Men: Cup-shaped design for a close, comfortable fit
• Odour Control: Worry-free protection
• Convenient and Discreet: Individually wrapped for convenience and disposability.
• Stays in place: Strong adhesive that fits inside your own underwear (briefs or boxer-briefs)

Plus, it also supports formation of collagen, supports wound healing and acts as an antioxidant to reduce free radicals formed in the body - all of that in one daily chewable.

Proudly Australian Made® by Cenovis, trusted by Australian families for over 85 years, Cenovis Chewable Mega C 1000mg are quality tested during manufacturing to ensure product consistency and potency. Cenovis Chewable Mega C 1000mg contain no added gluten, lactose, artificial flavours, dairy products or animal-derived products.*

Adults: chew 1 tablet daily or as recommended by your healthcare provider. Chew before swallowing. Not to be used by children under 2 years of age without medical advice. If symptoms persist, see your healthcare professional. Vitamin supplements should not replace a balanced diet. Always read label and follow the directions for use. *Contains: saccharin, sugars, sulfites, and sodium (83mg/tablet).

• CHEWABLE TABLET: A convenient alternative to swallowing pills with a tasty orange flavor
• NO ADDED: Gluten, lactose, artificial flavours, dairy products, or animal-derived products*

description.en:
Makes a perfect bottle temperature feed in just 90 seconds* (that's up to 10x faster than a kettle**). It's quick, quiet, and scientifically proven to make a fresh feed safely**. Baby bottle preparation made even more perfect.

1. Scoop formula powder into a sterile bottle.

2. Select feed size on the one-touch dial.

3. Press the power button to add the hot shot.

4. Twist on a milk lid, and swirl to mix.

5. Press the power button to add the remaining cool filtered water. The Tommee Tippee app is updated regularly to improve performance. By always using the latest version, you can make sure your Perfect Prep machine has all the latest features and continues to run smoothly.

*Based on a 5oz feed, room temperature water tank, refers to time from start of hot shot to completion of cool shot.

*For verification see tommeetippee.com/perfect-prep-explained.?

***If you use your water jug for daily water consumption in your household (outside of the machine) you should change your Tommee Tippee water filter every 4 weeks to ensure optimum performance. Based on preparing 6x 9oz bottles per day.

Suitable For: months

Boxed Contents: 1x Perfect Prep unit, 1x filter, 1x travel lid, 1x 150ml Bottle

Size: 150ml

KEY FEATURES

• Safe bottle feeds, fast: The Tommee Tippee antibacterial filter is as effective as boiling water, and our patented hot shot kills bacteria in formula**
• Peace of mind: PerfectPrep is precisely calibrated to deliver a safe, perfect bottle temperature formula feed, direct from machine to bottle
• Simple to use, day and night: Choose to make a bottle feed from 120-330ml with easy one-touch selection. Specially designed with stacking cups to perfectly position different sized bottles
• Night feed-friendly: Less disruptive bottle feeds (even at 3am). With smooth (and super quiet) water dispense and soft glow lights
• Intuitive app: Use the Tommee Tippee app to activate the latest product features and access step by step set up guides, product support and filter reordering prompts for your PerfectPrep machine?
• Removable water jug: PerfectPrep makes fresh bottles for baby, and the easy-to-refill water jug serves fresh drinking water for you***
• Minimal, kitchen counter-friendly design: Stylish, contemporary and made to suit your space, the PerfectPrep machine measures 158W x 260H x 330L (mm)

Chromium (from Chromium picolinate) 50 micrograms,
Iodine (from Potassium iodide) 200 micrograms,

Betacarotene 1.5mg.

description.en:
Caruso's Women's Super Multi is a high potency, multi nutrient supplement which has been formulated to support the general health and wellbeing of women. Caruso's Women's Super Multi combines vitamins, minerals, antioxidants and other nutrients to provide a natural and convenient one-a-day formula.

Why Use Caruso's Women's Super Multi?
Caruso's Women's Super Multi is a natural formula which contains a potent blend of vitamins, minerals, antioxidants and other essential nutrients which have been carefully selected to help support the general health and wellbeing of women.

Caruso's Women's Super Multi helps to maintain the formation of collagen while assisting with connective tissue production, which can help to support wound healing and skin regeneration. This formula assists with the maintenance of a healthy nervous system by helping to support a healthy stress response in the body and supporting energy production. Additional benefits include enhancement of immunity and supporting healthy red blood cells alongside blood oxygen levels.

Size: 60 Film Coated Tablets

KEY FEATURES

• Maintains energy levels
• Supports a heathy stress response in the body.
• Supports healthy immune system function
• Supports hair, skin & nail health
• Assists healthy red blood cell production
• Maintains general health & wellbeing
• Convenient 1 a day tablet.

description.en:
Helps reduce occurrence of mild migraines

Help reduce the occurrence of mild migraines and maintain your body's energy levels with Nature's Own Vitamin B2 100mg tablets. Our easy-to-swallow vitamin B2 supplement provides 100 milligrams of riboflavin (Vitamin B2), which, when taken at the recommended daily dosage, can help reduce the occurrence of mild migraines. In addition, Nature's Own Vitamin B2 100mg tablets also aid digestion of dietary fat, as well as aids in the metabolism of carbohydrates, fats, and proteins. Taken daily, Nature's Own Vitamin B2 100mg tablets maintain normal levels of Vitamin B2, and may be helpful for individuals in certain stages of life, such as seniors, women who exercise regularly, or vegans. Add Nature's Own Vitamin B2 100mg tablets to your daily nutritional regime knowing that our product contains no added gluten, lactose, sugar, artificial colours, artificial flavours, artificial sweeteners, artificial preservatives, dairy products or animal-derived products. For energy levels, take 1 tablet daily with food; for mild migraines take 4 tablets daily with food or as recommended by your healthcare professional. Always read the label and follow the directions for use.

Suitable For: Recommended Adult Dosage For energy levels: Take 1 tablet daily with food. For mild migraines: Take 4 tablets daily with food. Or as recommended by your healthcare professional.

Product Claims: Nature's Own Vitamin B2 100mg helps reduce occurrence of mild migraines and supports energy levels.

Size: 100 Tablets

KEY FEATURES

• HELPS REDUCE OCCURRENCE OF MILD MIGRAINES: 4 tablets taken daily with food helps reduce occurrence of mild migraines
• SUPPORTS ENERGY LEVELS: 1 tablet taken daily with food helps support the body's energy levels
• ASSISTS FAT METABOLISM: Vitamin B2 helps the body metabolise dietary fat
• AIDS METABOLISM: Helps metabolise carbohydrates, fats, and proteins
• MAINTAINS VITAMIN B2 LEVELS: Maintains Vitamin B2 levels in normal range in individuals in certain stages of life, such as seniors, women who exercise regularly, or vegans
• Always read the label and follow the directions for use. See product warnings below

cwr-supplier-content.en:
Cenovis Magnesium

Magnesium is an essential mineral for the human body. It is needed for bone formation, and plays an important role in muscle contraction (when dietary intake is inadequate).

Cenovis Magnesium relieves muscle cramps and mild muscle spasms when dietary intake is inadequate. It also supports bone health.

Cenovis Magnesium is a versatile supplement to:

1. Support bone health and muscle relaxation when dietary intake is inadequate
2. Relieve muscle cramps (when dietary intake is inadequate)
3. Relieve symptoms of premenstrual tension

Support bone health with Cenovis Magnesium

Muscle function maintenance

Magnesium plays a role in a wide range of fundamental biologic reactions and therefore is an essential mineral for the body. It plays an important role in supporting healthy muscle contraction function and muscle relaxation, when dietary intake is inadequate.

Cramp relief

Cenovis Magnesium may be of benefit to those experiencing cramps as it reduces and decreases muscle cramps and mild muscle spasms when dietary intake is inadequate.

Premenstrual symptoms support

Cenovis Magnesium decreases and reduces symptoms of premenstrual tension.

Convenient dosage

1-2 tablets daily: for muscle cramps, spasms, bone and heart health take one to two tablets daily with food, or as recommended by your healthcare professional.

description.en:

In addition, Magnesium supports bone health, and eases the symptoms of premenstrual tension. Proudly Australian Made® by Cenovis, trusted by Australian families for over 80 years, Cenovis Magnesium tablets are quality tested during manufacturing to ensure product consistency and potency. Cenovis Magnesium tablets contain no added gluten, lactose, artificial flavours, artificial sweeteners, dairy products or animal-derived products. Adults 19 years and over: Take 1 to 2 tablets twice daily with food, or as recommended by your healthcare professional. If symptoms persist consult your healthcare practitioner. WARNING - Stop taking this medication if you experience tingling, burning or numbness and see your healthcare professional as soon as possible (Contains Vitamin B6).

description.en:
Supports healthy immune system function.

Relieve common cold symptoms with Nature’s Own Zinc + C Chewable tablets. Nature’s Own Zinc + Vitamin C supports healthy immune system function, as well as relieves the severity and duration of common cold symptoms. In addition, this chewable vitamin and mineral supplement also maintains skin health and formation of collagen, as well as supports wound healing. Use Nature’s Own Zinc + C Chewable tablets knowing it contain no added lactose, artificial colours or flavours, dairy products or animal-derived products*. Adults: chew 2 tablets twice daily with food or as recommended by their healthcare provider;  Always read the label and follow the directions for use.

*Contains gluten, sulfites, sucralose and sugars.

Suitable For: Adults: Chew 2 tablets twice daily with food or as recommended by your healthcare professional.

Product Claims: Nature's Own Zinc + C Chewable reduces duration and relieves severity of common cold symptoms, supports healthy immune system function, maintains skin health and supports collagen formation, and supports wound healing.

Size: 60 Tablets

KEY FEATURES

• COLD SYMPTOM RELIEF: Helps to relieve the severity of common cold symptoms, as well as reduces the duration
• IMMUNITY SUPPORT: Zinc and Vitamin C provide support for healthy immune system function
• SUPPORTS SKIN HEALTH: Helps support and maintain healthy skin, collagen formation, and wound healing
• Use Nature's Own® Zinc + C Chewable tablets knowing they contain no added lactose, artificial colours or flavours, dairy products, or animal-derived products*
• RECOMMENDED DOSAGE: Adults, chew 2 tablets twice daily with food or as recommended by your healthcare provider; Always read the label and follow the directions of use
• Always read the label and follow the directions for use

cwr-au-directions.en:
Suggested twice a day or as recommended by your healthcare professional.

Ensure Powder can be enjoyed as a delicious health shake with or between meals, or to replace a meal.

To prepare a 230 mL serving of Ensure Powder:
1) Pour 195 mL of cold water into a glass.
2) Gradually add 6 level scoops or 53.8 g of Ensure Powder while stirring and mix until dissolved. Ensure is best served chilled.

Ensure Powder can also be added to a wide range of recipes as a nutritional boost to your favourite meal.

Opened can should be covered and stored in a cool, dry place, but NOT refrigerated. Once opened, use contents within 3 weeks.

Prepared Ensure should be used promptly or covered, refrigerated and used within 24 hours.

cwr-au-ingredients.en:
Hydrolysed corn starch, sucrose, maltodextrin, VEGETABLE OIL (high oleic sunflower oil, soy oil, canola oil), milk protein concentrate, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), soy protein isolate, cocoa powder, MINERALS (sodium citrate, potassium citrate, magnesium chloride, potassium chloride, calcium phosphate tribasic, zinc sulphate, ferrous sulphate, manganese sulphate, cupric sulphate, potassium iodide, sodium molybdate, chromium chloride, sodium selenate), flavouring, VITAMINS (choline chloride, ascorbic acid, calcium pantothenate, Vitamin E, niacinamide, pyridoxine hydrochloride, riboflavin, Vitamin A palmitate, thiamin hydrochloride, beta carotene, folic acid, phylloquinone, biotin, Vitamin D3, cyanocobalamin), ANTIOXIDANTS (304, 307b).

May contain: calcium carbonate, potassium phosphate dibasic, magnesium sulphate, sodium chloride.

Contains: Milk and Soy Ingredients.

cwr-au-mandatory-statement.en:
Always read the label and follow the directions for use. 

Please refer to any health and product warnings below.

cwr-au-warnings.en:
Food for Special Medical Purposes. Use under medical supervision.

Ensure Powder is suitable as a sole source of nutrition or as a supplement.

Not intended for use in children unless recommended by a physician or other qualified healthcare professional.

Not for use in galactosaemia.

Not for parenteral use.

cwr-supplier-content.en:
Complete, balanced nutrition

• Scientifically formulated to include all the key ingredients for a nutritionally-balanced health shake1

• The Ensure brand is supported by over 30 clinical studies2

28 essential vitamins and minerals to help keep you strong and healthy1,3

High quality protein to support muscle development1,3

Enriched with prebiotic fibre (FOS) to support gut and immune health1,4,5

Ensure Health Benefits

Did you know that we lose up to 8% of muscle mass each decade after the age of 40?6 With high quality protein, Ensure® helps adults maintain strength and health.1

Contains calcium to support strong bones1,3

Contains antioxidants and essential minerals to help support immune health1,3

Source of energy to help you keep doing what you love1

How To Use Ensure

Enjoy as a health shake
Just mix 6 scoops in 195 mL water

Mix into favourite recipes
Ensure can be added to food to boost its nutritional value*

Food for Special Medical Purposes. Use under medical supervision.
FOS: Fructo-oligosaccharides.
*Please note when cooking with or freezing Ensure powder, there may be minor losses of some nutrients.

description.en:
Ensure Powder is a complete, balanced oral nutritional supplement, scientifically formulated for people with or at risk of malnutrition, to help support strength, energy and immunity.

Ensure Powder Features and Benefits:
1) Complete and balanced nutrition with 28 essential vitamins and minerals to help fill nutritional gaps.
2) High quality triple protein complex (whey, casein and soy) and vitamin D to keep muscles strong.
4) Calcium, phosphorus and vitamin D to maintain bone health.
5) Prebiotic fibre and antioxidants (vitamins C, E, zinc and selenium) for immune support.
6) Low lactose* and gluten free**

After your purchase visit www.abbottrewards.com.au where you can earn up to $40 cashback† just by purchasing a tin of Ensure, Glucerna or PediaSure. It's our way of saying thank you for choosing Abbott.

*Low lactose refers to the product containing no more than 2 g of lactose per 100 g.
**Gluten free refers to the product containing no detectable gluten at a limit of quantification of 5 ppm.
†T&C's apply. Valid for purchases made between 12:01am on 01/07/2025 and 11:59pm AEDT on 31/07/2026. Proof of purchase required. Visit www.abbottrewards.com.au for full details.


Ensure is the #1 Nutritional supplement drink in the world^ and is backed by over 45 clinical studies.

^ Source Euromonitor International Limited; Consumer Health 2025 edition, per Supplement Nutrition Drinks category definition, retail value sales, RSP 2024 data.

Suitable For: Ensure is suitable as a sole source of nutrition or as a supplement as it has been carefully formulated to include all the key ingredients for a nutritionally complete and balanced health shake. Providing high-quality protein, Ensure tastes great and is perfect addition to your day.

Ensure may assist:
- During illness or recovery from illness
- When preparing for surgery, or post surgery
- If you have a poor appetite or involuntary weight loss
- If you have increased nutritional requirements
- To maintain good nutrition

Size: 850g

KEY FEATURES

• 28 essential vitamins and minerals to help keep you strong and healthy
• High quality protein to support muscle development
• Enriched with prebiotic fibre (FOS) to support gut and immune health
